Abathur.name: Abathur
Abathur.title: Evolution Master
Abathur.searchText: Abathur Zerg Swarm HotS Heart of the Swarm StarCraft II 2 SC2 Star2 Starcraft2 SC slug Double Soak
Abathur.description: A unique Hero that can manipulate the battle from anywhere on the map.
Abathur.infoText: Abathur, the Evolution Master of Kerrigan's Swarm, works ceaselessly to improve the zerg from the genetic level up. His hate for chaos and imperfection almost rivals his hatred of pronouns.

Basic.name: Symbiote
Basic.shortText: Assist an ally and gain new abilities
Basic.fullText: Spawn and attach a Symbiote to a target ally or Structure. While active, Abathur controls the Symbiote, gaining access to new Abilities. The Symbiote is able to gain XP from nearby enemy deaths.

Basic.name: Toxic Nest
Basic.fullText: Spawn a mine that becomes active after a short time. Deals 153 damage and reveals the enemy for 4 seconds. Lasts 90 seconds.  Stores up to 3 charges.

Heroic.name: Evolve Monstrosity
Heroic.shortText: Minion or Locust becomes a powerful Monstrosity
Heroic.fullText: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains 2% Health and 2% Basic Attack damage, stacking up to 40 times. The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every 80 seconds.  Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits. This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity.

Heroic.name: Ultimate Evolution
Heroic.shortText: Clone target allied Hero and control it
Heroic.fullText: Clone target allied Hero and control it for 20 seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it 20% Spell Power, 20% bonus Attack Damage, and 10% bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability.

Trait.name: Locust Strain
Trait.shortText: Spawn locusts that attack down the nearest lane
Trait.fullText: Spawns a Locust to attack down the nearest lane every 15 seconds. Locusts last for 16 seconds, have 350 health and deal 58 damage with each Basic Attack, dealing 25% bonus damage to enemy Structures.

Mount.name: Deep Tunnel
Mount.fullText: Quickly tunnel to a visible location.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for 6 seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring 1125 Health.

Heroic.name: Evolve Monstrosity Active
Heroic.fullText: Activate to cast Symbiote on Abathur's Monstrosity.

Activable.name: Calldown: MULE
Activable.fullText: Activate to calldown a Mule that repairs Structures, one at a time, near target point for 40 seconds, healing for 90 Health every 1 second.

Activable.name: Locust Brood
Activable.fullText: Activate to spawn 3 Locusts at a nearby location.

Activable.name: Locust Nest
Activable.fullText: Activate to create a nest that periodically spawns Locusts. Only one Locust Nest can be active at a time.

Level1.name: Pressurized Glands
Level1.shortText: Increases Spike Burst range and decreases cooldown
Level1.fullText: Increases the range of Symbiote's Spike Burst by 25% and decreases the cooldown by 1 second.

Level1.name: Envenomed Nest
Level1.shortText: Toxic Nests deal more damage, reduce Armor
Level1.fullText: Toxic Nests deal 75% more damage over 3 seconds and reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.

Level1.name: Reinforced Carapace
Level1.fullText: Increase the Shield amount of Carapace by 40%.

Level1.name: Survival Instincts
Level1.fullText: Increases Locust's Health by 100% and damage by 60%.

Level4.name: Adrenal Overload
Level4.fullText: Heroic Symbiote hosts gain 25% increased Attack Speed.

Level4.name: Needlespine
Level4.fullText: Increases the damage and range of Symbiote's Stab by 20%.

Level4.name: Prolific Dispersal
Level4.fullText: Increase the duration of Toxic Nests by 45 seconds, reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds, and add 2 additional charges.

Level7.name: Vile Nest
Level7.fullText: Toxic Nests Slow enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2.5 seconds.

Level7.name: Networked Carapace
Level7.fullText: Using Symbiote's Carapace also applies an untalented Carapace Shield to all nearby allied Heroes, Minions, and Mercenaries.

Level7.name: Calldown: MULE
Level7.fullText: Activate to calldown a Mule that repairs Structures, one at a time, near target point for 40 seconds, healing for 90 Health every 1 second.

Level10.name: Ultimate Evolution
Level10.shortText: Clone target allied Hero and control it
Level10.fullText: Clone target allied Hero and control it for 20 seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it 20% Spell Power, 20% bonus Attack Damage, and 10% bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability.

Level10.name: Evolve Monstrosity
Level10.shortText: Minion or Locust becomes a powerful Monstrosity
Level10.fullText: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains 2% Health and 2% Basic Attack damage, stacking up to 40 times. The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every 80 seconds.  Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits. This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity.

Level13.name: Spatial Efficiency
Level13.fullText: Symbiote's Stab gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by .5 seconds.

Level13.name: Soma Transference
Level13.shortText: Spike Burst heals for each Hero hit
Level13.fullText: Symbiote's Spike Burst heals the host for 64 Health per enemy Hero hit.

Level13.name: Bombard Strain
Level13.shortText: Locusts gain a ranged attack, increased duration
Level13.fullText: Locust's Basic Attacks become a long-range siege attack and their duration is increased by 75%.

Level16.name: Envenomed Spikes
Level16.fullText: Abathur's Symbiote's Spike Burst also Slows enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2 seconds.

Level16.name: Adrenaline Boost
Level16.fullText: Symbiote's Carapace increases the Movement Speed of the target by 40% for 3.5 seconds.

Level16.name: Volatile Mutation
Level16.fullText: Ultimate Evolution clones and Monstrosities deal 137 damage to nearby enemies every 3 seconds and when they die. Enemy Heroes hit heal the clone or Monstrosity for 100% of the damage dealt.

Level16.name: Locust Brood
Level16.fullText: Activate to spawn 3 Locusts at a nearby location.

Level20.name: Evolutionary Link
Level20.shortText: Ultimate Evolution target gets a Shield
Level20.fullText: Increase the duration of Ultimate Evolution by 50%. As long as the Ultimate Evolution is alive, the original target of the clone gains a Shield equal to 35% of their maximum Health. Refreshes every 5 seconds.

Level20.name: Evolution Complete
Level20.fullText: Increase Monstrosity's Basic Attack damage by 100%.

Level20.name: Hivemind
Level20.fullText: Symbiote creates an additional Symbiote on a nearby allied Hero. This Symbiote mimics the commands of the first, but does half damage and Shielding.

Level20.name: Locust Nest
Level20.fullText: Activate to create a nest that periodically spawns Locusts. Only one Locust Nest can be active at a time.

AbathurSymbiote.name: Symbiote
AbathurSymbiote.description: Spawn and attach a Symbiote to a target ally or Structure. While active, Abathur controls the Symbiote, gaining access to new Abilities. The Symbiote is able to gain XP from nearby enemy deaths.

Basic.name: Stab
Basic.shortText: Shoots a spike that deals damage to the first enemy it contacts.
Basic.fullText: Shoots a spike towards target area that deals 119 damage to the first enemy it contacts.

Basic.name: Carapace
Basic.fullText: Shields the assisted ally for 150. Allied Heroes are healed for 22 Health per second while the Shield is active. Lasts for 6 seconds.

Mount.name: Deep Tunnel
Mount.fullText: Order your Evolved Monstrosity to quickly tunnel to a visible location

Alarak.name: Alarak
Alarak.title: Highlord of the Tal'darim
Alarak.searchText: Alarak Ascendant Protoss SC SC2 StarCraft Star2 Starcraft2 II 2 Legacy of the Void LotV Covert Ops CO Displace Burst
Alarak.description: A combo Assassin that can move enemies around and punish mistakes.
Alarak.infoText: Not all heroes are born of altruism... some, like Alarak, simply desire vengeance. As the new Highlord of the Tal'darim, Alarak leads his people to a destiny free of the corrupt influence of the fallen xel'naga, Amon.

Basic.name: Discord Strike
Basic.shortText: Damage and silence enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: After a 0.5 second delay, enemies in front of Alarak take 165 damage and are silenced for 1.5 seconds.

Basic.name: Telekinesis
Basic.fullText: Vector Targeting Create a force, pushing Alarak and all enemies hit from the targeted point towards the targeted direction. Deals 48 damage to enemies.

Basic.name: Lightning Surge
Basic.fullText: Deal 62 damage to an enemy and an additional 100% damage to enemies between Alarak and the target. Restore 75 health for each Hero hit.

Heroic.name: Deadly Charge
Heroic.shortText: Channel to charge a long distance
Heroic.fullText: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

Heroic.name: Counter-Strike
Heroic.shortText: Prevents damage to deal damage in a large area
Heroic.fullText: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 damage.

Trait.name: Sadism
Trait.shortText: Each point of Sadism increases Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing against enemy Heroes by 1%  Repeatable Quest: Takedowns increase Sadism by 3%, up to 30%. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.
Trait.fullText: Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by 100% against enemy Heroes.  Repeatable Quest: Takedowns increase Sadism by 3%, up to 30%. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for 1 second, gain 30% Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for 6 seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring 1125 Health and 150 Mana.

Trait.name: Counter-Strike
Trait.shortText: Deal increased ability damage to Heroes
Trait.fullText: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 damage.  Sadism  Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by 100% against enemy Heroes.  Takedowns increase Sadism by 3%, up to 30%. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.

Heroic.name: Unleash Deadly Charge
Heroic.fullText: Unleash Alarak's Deadly Charge.  Issuing a move order while this is channeling will cancel the cast at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

Trait.name: Deadly Charge
Trait.shortText: Deal increased ability damage to Heroes
Trait.fullText: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.  Sadism  Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by 100% against enemy Heroes.  Takedowns increase Sadism by 3%, up to 30%. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.

Trait.name: Unleash Deadly Charge
Trait.fullText: Unleash Alarak's Deadly Charge.  Issuing a move order while this is channeling will cancel the cast at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

Activable.name: Rite of Rak'Shir
Activable.shortText: Mark and damage Hero to increase Sadism
Activable.fullText: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for 300 seconds.  Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by 3%. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by 5% and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to 10 seconds.  Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.

Basic.name: Lightning Surge
Basic.fullText: Deal 62 damage to an enemy and an additional 100% damage to enemies between Alarak and the target. Restore 75 health for each Hero hit.

Activable.name: Hasty Bargain
Activable.shortText: Activate to reduce Sadism bonus and reset Basic Ability cooldowns
Activable.fullText: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by 4% and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.

Activable.name: Last Laugh
Activable.shortText: Cleanse and teleport, but reduce Health
Activable.fullText: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes 3 times with Basic Abilities within 4 seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to 1.

Activable.name: Might of the Highlord
Activable.fullText: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.

Activable.name: Might of the Highlord
Activable.fullText: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.

Level1.name: Overwhelming Power
Level1.shortText: Discord Strike grants Attack Speed, Lifesteal
Level1.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 40% Attack Speed and causes Basic Attacks to heal for 15% of the damage dealt, increased by 50% of Sadism's bonus when hitting Heroes. These effects last for 4 seconds.

Level1.name: Ruthless Momentum
Level1.fullText: Reduce the Mana cost of Telekinesis from 30 to 20. Telekinesis's cooldown recharges 100% faster while above 80% Health.

Level1.name: Extended Lightning
Level1.shortText: Quest: Reduce Sadism, empower Lightning Surge
Level1.fullText: Reduce Sadism by 10%.  Quest: Hit Heroes with the center of Lightning Surge.  Reward: After hitting 5 Heroes, increase Lightning Surge's range by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Lightning Surge's center also Slows enemies by 40% for 2 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with the center of a single cast, increase Sadism by 10% and instantly gain all other Rewards.

Level4.name: Chaos Reigns
Level4.shortText: Quest: Hit Heroes to increase Discord Strike damage
Level4.fullText: Quest: Hit Heroes with Discord Strike.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, increase Discord Strike's damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 2 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 100 and instantly gain all other Rewards.

Level4.name: Negatively Charged
Level4.shortText: Quest: Increase Lightning Surge center damage
Level4.fullText: Increase the Lightning Surge damage bonus to enemies between Alarak and his victim to 175%.  Repeatable Quest: Each Hero hit by the center of Lightning Surge permanently increases the damage bonus by 5%.

Level4.name: Show of Force
Level4.shortText: Ability combos deal bonus damage, grant Sadism
Level4.fullText: Heroes hit with 3 of Alarak's Abilities within 2 seconds take an additional 61 damage and increase Sadism by 2%, stacking up to 20%.   Sadism gained from Show of Force is lost on death.

Level7.name: Dissonance
Level7.fullText: Increase Discord Strike's Silence duration by 0.75 seconds.

Level7.name: Hindered Motion
Level7.fullText: Telekinesis Slows enemies by 30% for 3 seconds.

Level7.name: Applied Force
Level7.shortText: Reduce Sadism, increase Telekinesis distance, range
Level7.fullText: Reduce Sadism by 10%, but Telekinesis pushes 15% further and has 15% increased range.

Level10.name: Deadly Charge
Level10.shortText: Channel to charge a long distance
Level10.fullText: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

Level10.name: Counter-Strike
Level10.shortText: Prevents damage to deal damage in a large area
Level10.fullText: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 damage.

Level13.name: Blade of the Highlord
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Sadism by 2% stacking up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Blade of the Highlord is lost on death.

Level13.name: Pure Malice
Level13.fullText: Increase Sadism by 10% any time an allied Hero dies, up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Pure Malice is lost on death.

Level13.name: Rite of Rak'Shir
Level13.shortText: Mark and damage Hero to increase Sadism
Level13.fullText: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for 300 seconds.  Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by 3%. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by 5% and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to 10 seconds.  Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.

Level16.name: Lethal Onslaught
Level16.shortText: Discord Strike grants Sadism bonus to Basic Attacks
Level16.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 50% of Sadism's damage bonus to Alarak's Basic Attacks for 4 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh this duration.

Level16.name: Lightning Barrage
Level16.shortText: Center hits grant free Lightning Surge cast
Level16.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with the center of Lightning Surge allows it to be cast again for free on a different primary target within the next 3 seconds. This free cast cannot benefit from Lightning Barrage.

Level16.name: Mocking Strikes
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Alarak's Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds. This bonus is doubled against enemy Heroes who are Stunned, Silenced, Slowed, or Rooted.

Level20.name: Wrath of the Highlord
Level20.shortText: Deadly Charge empowers Sadism's damage Basic Abilities reduce Counter-Strike's cooldown
Level20.fullText: If Deadly Charge was the selected Heroic, Heroes hit by Deadly Charge take bonus damage from Alarak's Abilities equal to 75% of Sadism's bonus damage for 4 seconds.  If Counter-Strike was the selected Heroic, its cooldown is reduced by 2.5 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by Alarak's Basic Abilities.

Level20.name: Might of the Highlord
Level20.fullText: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.

Level20.name: Last Laugh
Level20.shortText: Cleanse and teleport, but reduce Health
Level20.fullText: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes 3 times with Basic Abilities within 4 seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to 1.

Level20.name: Hasty Bargain
Level20.shortText: Activate to reduce Sadism bonus and reset Basic Ability cooldowns
Level20.fullText: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by 4% and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.

Alexstrasza.name: Alexstrasza
Alexstrasza.title: The Life-Binder
Alexstrasza.searchText: Alexstraza Alekstrasza Alekstraza Warcraft 2 WC2 WoW Cataclysm Wrath of the Lich King WotLK dragon elf Queen of Dragons Fire Slow Displace Sustain Healer
Alexstrasza.description: A Healer who shares her Health with allies and can transform into a Dragon to empower her Abilities.
Alexstrasza.infoText: Alexstrasza, the queen of dragons, was empowered by the titans to be the guardian of all life on Azeroth. She has aided mortals time and again, even at great personal cost. Now, she soars across the Nexus, protecting life wherever she finds it.

Basic.name: Gift of Life
Basic.shortText: Give a portion of Health to an allied Hero
Basic.fullText: Sacrifice 15% of Alexstrasza's current Health, healing an allied Hero for 150% of that amount.  Passive: Increase Alexstrasza's Health regeneration by 150%.  Dragonqueen: Breath of Life Cooldown greatly reduced and does not cost Health.

Basic.name: Abundance
Basic.shortText: Heal allied Heroes in an area
Basic.fullText: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after 3 seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for 20% of their maximum Health.  Dragonqueen: Preservation Heal area and amount greatly increased.

Basic.name: Flame Buffet
Basic.shortText: Launch a fireball that ignites enemies and can Slow them
Basic.fullText: Launch a fireball, Burning enemies hit for 75 damage over 5.5 seconds.  Hitting enemies that are already Burning deals 125 bonus damage upon impact, Slows them by 40% decaying over 2 seconds, and refunds the Mana cost.  Dragonqueen: Wing Buffet Damage and Knockback enemies in an arc.

Heroic.name: Life-Binder
Heroic.shortText: Link Alexstrasza's Health with an ally
Heroic.fullText: Bind Alexstrasza's life force with an allied Hero. Both her and her target are healed for 480 Health over 2 seconds. Afterwards, the Hero with a lower percentage of Health is healed to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.  Dragonqueen: Cast range increased by 45%.

Heroic.name: Cleansing Flame
Heroic.shortText: Rain healing and damaging fire from the sky
Heroic.fullText: After 1.25 seconds, take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 Health.  2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.

Trait.name: Dragonqueen
Trait.shortText: Transform into a dragon aspect with empowered Abilities
Trait.fullText: After 1.25 seconds, transform into a dragon and gain 500 Health.  While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Abilities are empowered, and her Basic Attacks deal 143 damage and heal allied Heroes for 43 in an arc in front of her. Additionally, the duration of incoming Stuns, Roots, and Slows, is reduced by 50%.  Lasts 15 seconds.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for 1 second, gain 30% Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for 6 seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring 1125 Health and 150 Mana.

Activable.name: Life Unbound
Activable.shortText: Heal an ally and damage enemies
Activable.fullText: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 15% of their maximum Health and deal 200 damage to nearby enemies.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Life Unbound's cooldown by 30 seconds.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza.

Activable.name: Pacify
Activable.shortText: Slow an enemy Hero and reduce their damage
Activable.fullText: Activate to Slow and reduce an enemy Hero's damage by 50% for 3 seconds.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Pacify's cooldown by 30 seconds.

Activable.name: Dragon Scales
Activable.fullText: Gain 50 Armor while Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced, and for 2 seconds after. Can only trigger once every 10 seconds.

Activable.name: Blessing of the Red
Activable.shortText: Grant bonus Health to an ally
Activable.fullText: Activate to grant an allied Hero 500 bonus maximum Health until they die.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza, or on a Hero who already has Blessing of the Red.

Level1.name: Live and Let Live
Level1.shortText: High Health reduces Gift of Life cooldown
Level1.fullText: While Alexstrasza is above 75% Health, Gift of Life's cooldown recharges 125% faster.

Level1.name: Circle of Life
Level1.fullText: Quest: Collect Regeneration Globes.  Reward: After collecting 10 Regeneration Globes, Abundance heals for an additional 5% maximum Health.  Reward: After collecting 15 Regeneration Globes, Abundance's healing burst creates a Regeneration Globe.

Level1.name: Flames of Fury
Level1.shortText: Quest: Flame Buffet reduces Dragonqueen cooldown
Level1.fullText: Reduce the Mana cost of Flame Buffet from 50 to 40.  Quest: Hit 20 Burning Heroes with Flame Buffet.  Reward: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet reduces Dragonqueen's cooldown by 5 seconds.

Level4.name: Surge of Vitality
Level4.fullText: Abundance's healing burst grants allied Heroes 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.

Level4.name: Heat Exhaustion
Level4.fullText: Increase Flame Buffet's Slow from 40% to 50% and cause it to no longer decay.

Level4.name: Exuberance
Level4.fullText: While above 75% Health, gain 15% Movement Speed.

Level7.name: Lifeblossom
Level7.shortText: Gift of Life creates a Lifeblossom at high Health
Level7.fullText: While Alexstrasza is above 75% Health, Gift of Life creates a Lifeblossom at the target's location. Alexstrasza can collect the Lifeblossom to make her next Gift of Life cost no Health.  Passive: Reduces the cost of Gift of Life to 10% of Alexstrasza's current Health.

Level7.name: Verdant Flourish
Level7.shortText: Regen Globe and Abundance healing increased
Level7.fullText: Alexstrasza receives 40% more healing from Abundance and 100% more healing from Regeneration Globes.

Level7.name: Fire Within
Level7.fullText: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet heals Alexstrasza for 10% of her maximum Health.

Level10.name: Life-Binder
Level10.shortText: Link Alexstrasza's Health with an ally
Level10.fullText: Bind Alexstrasza's life force with an allied Hero. Both her and her target are healed for 480 Health over 2 seconds. Afterwards, the Hero with a lower percentage of Health is healed to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.  Dragonqueen: Cast range increased by 45%.

Level10.name: Cleansing Flame
Level10.shortText: Rain healing and damaging fire from the sky
Level10.fullText: After 1.25 seconds, take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 Health.  2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.

Level13.name: Dragon Scales
Level13.fullText: Gain 50 Armor while Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced, and for 2 seconds after. Can only trigger once every 10 seconds.

Level13.name: Pacify
Level13.shortText: Slow an enemy Hero and reduce their damage
Level13.fullText: Activate to Slow and reduce an enemy Hero's damage by 50% for 3 seconds.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Pacify's cooldown by 30 seconds.

Level13.name: Life Unbound
Level13.shortText: Heal an ally and damage enemies
Level13.fullText: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 15% of their maximum Health and deal 200 damage to nearby enemies.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Life Unbound's cooldown by 30 seconds.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza.

Level16.name: Tough Love
Level16.fullText: Gift of Life grants its target 10 Armor for 2.5 seconds, increased to 30 while Alexstrasza is above 75% Health.

Level16.name: Overprotective
Level16.fullText: Heroes healed by Abundance gain a Shield for 6 seconds equal to 70% of the amount healed.

Level16.name: Draconic Discipline
Level16.fullText: Increase Dragonqueen's duration by 6 seconds, and Basic Attack healing by 50%.

Level20.name: On Ruby Wings
Level20.fullText: Healing or damaging Heroes 8 or more times with Cleansing Flame activates Dragonqueen for 15 seconds upon landing.

Level20.name: Ancient Flame
Level20.fullText: While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Basic Attacks apply Flame Buffet.

Level20.name: Blessing of the Red
Level20.shortText: Grant bonus Health to an ally
Level20.fullText: Activate to grant an allied Hero 500 bonus maximum Health until they die.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza, or on a Hero who already has Blessing of the Red.

Basic.name: Breath of Life
Basic.fullText: Heal an allied Hero for 20% of Alexstrasza's current Health.

Basic.name: Preservation
Basic.shortText: Heal allied Heroes in an area
Basic.fullText: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after 3 seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for 30% of their maximum Health.

Basic.name: Wing Buffet
Basic.fullText: Deal 150 damage to enemies in an area, knocking them back and Slowing them by 50% for 3 seconds.

Heroic.name: Life-Binder
Heroic.shortText: Link Alexstrasza's Health with an ally
Heroic.fullText: Bind Alexstrasza's life force with an allied Hero. Both her and her target are healed for 480 Health over 2 seconds. Afterwards, the Hero with a lower percentage of Health is healed to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.  Dragonqueen: Cast range increased by 45%.

Heroic.name: Cleansing Flame
Heroic.shortText: Rain healing and damaging fire from the sky
Heroic.fullText: Take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 Health.  2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.

Trait.name: Dragonqueen
Trait.shortText: Transform into a dragon aspect with empowered Abilities
Trait.fullText: Alexstrasza has transformed into a powerful dragon aspect, gaining 500 Health, resistance to disabling effects, and empowered Basic Attacks and Abilities.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for 1 second, gain 30% Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for 6 seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring 1125 Health and 150 Mana.
